$comment: Scripts policy registry. Read by scripts-policy-lint.sh, audit_script_inventory.py, and new-script.sh. Edit this file when adding/removing governed script directories.

governedDirs.rationale: Canonical operational scripts shared by every agent inside the openclaw-gateway container.
Trader workspace ops scripts; run by the trader agent inside the gateway container.
Overseer workspace ops scripts for pipeline status and priority-queue control on the gateway container.

exemptScripts.reason: The wrapper itself cannot require itself.

shared.consequence: Every OpenClaw agent sees one shared scripts/ tree and one shared script-runs.jsonl.

isolated.scope: AutoTap iOS build runners; out of scope
